summary: Prior generated-file patches from the initial 4.2.0 print are no longer needed — the 4.19.0 machine fixes them natively.
reason: PR #805 also flagged a non-deterministic cache key, a rate-limiter Wait() TOCTOU, discarded per-request context deadlines, and a silent token-refresh no-op — all in generator-owned files. The 4.19.0 reprint regenerates those files with the fixes built in (cacheKey is fully reworked, the client API is context-first, AdaptiveLimiter.Wait reserves its slot under the lock, refresh paths error explicitly), so no hand-edit to generated code remains for them.
validated_outcome: Verified by inspection of regenerated internal/client/client.go and internal/cliutil/ratelimit.go
